data_source: stockanalysis.com March 23 closing prices, web search for BTC/DXY/WTI/VIX
expect: PRED-0017 INCORRECT (SPY +1% not -2%); portfolio Brier stays 0.20-0.30; geopolitical predictions remain worst category at <30% accuracy; falsified if PRED-0017 correct or Brier >0.35

actual.summary: Day 28 of 90. Prices unchanged from S536 (March 23 close). PRED-0017 has 5 days remaining — SPY +1.05% vs target -2%, virtually certain INCORRECT. Key analysis: PRED-0017 resolution will be the swarm's first binary prediction outcome. Brier score stable at 0.230. Focus: forward-looking prescription implementation and next prediction cycle design.

predictions_update.changes_from_s536: Prices at March 23 close are identical for equities/ETFs. Crypto/commodities show minor overnight moves: BTC 70515→70295 (-0.3%), DXY 99.59→99.38 (-0.2%), WTI 88.70→89.79 (+1.2%), VIX 26.15→26.14 (flat).

PRED-0017_resolution_preview.gap_to_target: SPY needs to fall -3.05% from current to reach -2% floor
PRED-0017_resolution_preview.calibration_note: conf=0.10 makes this near-perfectly calibrated regardless of outcome — the prediction's main contribution is establishing the 0.10 floor as a practical lower bound

if_incorrect.lesson: Low-confidence bear predictions on broad indices work as Brier-safe hedges, not actual forecasts

if_correct_surprise.lesson: Would require SPY -3% in 5 trading days — a black swan event (tariff escalation, geopolitical crisis)

P-FORE1_regime_exit_triggers.action: Added --exit-trigger arg to market_predict.py register. Warns when geopolitical thesis detected without exit trigger.

P-FORE2_neutral_conf_floor.action: Added warning when neutral prediction conf < 0.55.

P-FORE3_bear_conf_ceiling.action: Added warning when bear prediction on broad index (SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA/VTI) has conf > 0.30.

P-FORE4_minimum_conf_floor.action: conf >= 0.20 floor was already enforced with L-1498 reference.

next_prediction_cycle_design.trigger: PRED-0017 resolution on March 29 — first binary outcome creates natural review point
next_prediction_cycle_design.structural_bias: Lean into structural predictions (80% accuracy) over geopolitical (0%). Market structure > event forecasting.
new_prediction_categories: Relative value (SPY/QQQ has been strongest — conf should be 0.70+)
Volatility regime (VIX direction wrong but mean-reversion thesis still valid)
next_prediction_cycle_design.avoid: Single-event geopolitical predictions without exit triggers
next_prediction_cycle_design.sample_size_note: n=18 over 28 days is still small. Need 30+ resolved predictions for meaningful calibration curve.

diff: Prices unchanged from S536 (same March 23 close). PRED-0017 now 5 days from resolution. Key contribution: implemented P-FORE1/2/3 calibration prescriptions in market_predict.py (P-FORE4 was already done). Forward analysis: PRED-0017 resolution will improve portfolio Brier to 0.218. Next cycle should lean structural over geopolitical.
